title: Empanada de Mincemeat
description: A traditional Argentinean dessert empanada filled with rich mincemeat, perfect for a sweet treat.
instructions: Roll out the empanada dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a spoonful of mincemeat in the center of each dough circle.
Top the mincemeat with a spoonful of aerated chocolate.
Fold the dough in half to form a half-moon shape, pressing the edges to seal.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with heavy cream and sprinkle with granulated sugar.
Bake the empanadas for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
